_readme: Riley crisis-detection test corpus (v2.3 Batch 0.2). Each case runs through detectCrisis() in netlify/functions/crisis-detection.js. HUMAN-AUTHORED requirement: these 10-12 are obvious SEED cases so the harness is wired and demonstrable - Brenden/a clinician author the real ~50 across the categories below before launch. Run: `node tests/crisis/corpus-runner.js`. Fields: id, category, input (string OR array of turns - array takes the MAX level across turns, modeling escalation), expected_level (0-3), note. Optional known_gap:true marks a case the detector currently mishandles (reported separately, not a hard failure) so gaps are visible, not hidden. Categories to fill out: direct_self_harm, indirect, embedded_in_calm, escalation, relapse_not_crisis, elevated, false_positive_negation, false_positive_sobriety, false_positive_lyric, false_positive_friend, past_tense_recovery.

cases.note: Oblique hopelessness the spec calls out.

cases.input: I don't think I want to wake up tomorrow
cases.note: Indirect - not a plan, still Level 3.

cases.input: work was fine and the kids are good, honestly I just wish I was dead
cases.note: Crisis language buried in an otherwise calm message.

input: I keep saying I'm fine but I'm not
I don't want to be here anymore
cases.note: Escalation across turns; max level must be caught on the final turn.

cases.input: I want to drink so bad right now
I relapsed last night and I feel awful
I'm so overwhelmed and anxious, everything is too much
I don't want to die, I promise - I'm just really tired
I don't want to drink anymore, I'm done with it
cases.note: Sobriety statement must NOT read as relapse intent.

cases.input: that song 'I can't live without your love' has been stuck in my head all day
my brother said he wants to hurt himself and I don't know what to do
cases.note: Third-party concern - the classifier keys on self (myself/me), so returns 0. Riley should still respond supportively downstream, but this is not the USER's self-harm classification.

cases.input: two years ago I wanted to kill myself but I got help and I'm okay now
cases.note: KNOWN GAP: detector currently returns 3 (matches 'kill myself' regardless of past tense). This is a SAFE over-trigger (offers 988 rather than missing), but flagged for the clinical corpus + a possible past-tense guard.
